title: milium molle
intro: Milium molle, also known as Aaron's rod or milium, is a plant species in the family Asphodelaceae. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of conditions such as arthritis, wounds, and skin irritations. Milium molle is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and can also be made into a salve or ointment to be applied topically for skin health benefits.
